title: BHN tinyproxy Requests
description: LA outbound API calls via Hillsboro tinyproxy. CONNECT events from /var/log/tinyproxy/tinyproxy.log.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(log_time, '1m') AS time, COUNT(*) AS reqs FROM proxy_request_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(log_time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT dst_host, COUNT(*) AS requests, COUNT(DISTINCT src_ip) AS unique_clients, MIN(log_time) AS first_seen, MAX(log_time) AS last_seen FROM proxy_request_logs WHERE log_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY dst_host ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 50
